next_step.current_state: All prerequisites satisfied; sender verified and oldest two Nina-linked invoices identified. Creating durable outbound reply record in outbox with required schema fields and attachments ordered newest-first per rule.
next_step.observation: Prepared reply payload: to miles@novak.example with attachments limited to the two oldest Nina-linked invoices.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest two invoices linked to Nina, attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write verification: attachments were both previously read and ordered newest-first by date (2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03); recipient matches canonical Miles primary_contact_email; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next cleanup is deleting processed inbox file (already read).
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

details:
1 validation error for NextStep
plan_remaining_steps_brief

    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/too_short

next_step.current_state: Task re-check: user asked to review next inbound note and act. I processed the inbox request, verified sender identity, found Nina-linked invoices, drafted outbound reply with the two oldest invoices (attachments ordered newest-first per outbox rule), and deleted the inbox item after completion. Completeness check: Nina-linked invoices found were 5 total; oldest two are dated 2025-11-03 and 2025-12-01, both attached. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request end-to-end and removed the handled inbox file.

function.message: Processed the inbound invoice-bundle request: verified the sender as Miles, identified the two oldest invoices linked to Nina, prepared an outbound email draft to Miles with those two invoices attached, and cleaned up the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), used inbox-email header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, used finance records for invoice selection, wrote outbound email record via sending-email workflow, enforced newest-first attachment order in outbox, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file requested 'oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina'. Canonical sender identity matched Miles (10_entities/cast/miles.md). Nina-linked invoices were evidenced in finance records; the two oldest were the 2025-11-03 INV-0001 and 2025-12-01 INV-0002 files, both read before inclusion. Request was completed and inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow cleanup rule.
completed_steps_laconic: write outbound email draft in outbox
